titleStmt.title: SII 23.348: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 348. (A.R. No. 348 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the north wall of the same maṇḍapa Rājēndra-Chōḷa I: year 3: 1015-16 A.D.

summary.p: This records a gift of 40 kāśu, which was invested on the purchase of a land, by Nakkaṉ Śembiyaṉ-Mādēviyār, a queen of Rājēndra-Chōḷa, 30 kāśu being meant for maintaining a perpetual lamp in front of the couch already presented by the queen for the deity and the balance for the renewal of the couch-spread periodically.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmarāna śrīrā[ jentracoḻa] devarkku yāṇṭu 3Āvatu śrīrājentrasiṅhavaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭu brahmadeyam
śrī coḻamāttāṇṭa caturvetimaṅkalattu tiruviyalūr mahātevarkku Uṭaiyār śrīrājentricoḻatevar teviyār nakkaṉ cempiyaṉmā teviyār
tiruvicalūr mahātevarkku muṉ vaiytta tiruppaḷḷikaṭṭilukku tirunondāviḷakku Erippataṟkku varakkāṭṭiṉa kācu 3 10- m Ivare tiruppaḷḷikkaṭṭilukku
paḷḷimippāvukku palicai Iṭa varakkāṭṭiṉa kācu 10- m Ikkācu 40 nāṟppatu kācum Ivvūr kaārampicceṭṭu Iḷaiyabhavakkanta
koṇṭa nilam m Ivvūr miypiṭākaiy śrī jaṉanātavatikku kiḻakku śrī Aḻakiya coḻavāykkālukku teṟkku 4 Āṅkaṇṇā 10 3
m-(ā)catirattu Ivaṉ nilam 3 pa Iṉ nila muṉṟu māmukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiy Arai muntirikai nilattukku vilaiyā
ka Ikkācu 4 10 nāṟppatu kācum kuṭuttu Ittiruno[ n=tāviḷakkukkum pa] ḷḷimippāvukkum can=tirātittavaṟ Erippataṟkkum paḷḷimippāvukku
palicaiyāka koṇṭu Iṭuvataṟkku vaittaṉa Ivai panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 23.348 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
